home.hero_desc: A platform that helps you generate accurate source code from natural language and test APIs instantly without leaving your browser.
home.features_desc: Providing all the tools you need to build, manage, and run a powerful Backend system without writing thousands of lines of manual code.
home.guide_title: Building Backend is Easy as Pie
home.cta_title: Ready to create your first Backend?

demo.user_prompt: Create a REST API for a task management app (Todo app) with Node.js and Express. Include CRUD endpoints and MongoDB connection.
demo.ai_status: Project structure created. Generating source code...

item1.title: Lightning-Fast API Generation
item1.desc: Just describe your idea in natural language, and AI will generate full, ready-to-use API source code (Node.js, Python, Go) in seconds.

item2.title: Smart Data Architecture
item2.desc: Automatically design optimal database schemas, establish complex relationships, and write the most efficient queries.

item3.title: Multi-Layer Security
item3.desc: Every line of generated code is automatically scanned by AI for security vulnerabilities to ensure compliance with OWASP and data encryption standards.

item4.title: One-Touch Deploy
item4.desc: Connect directly to AWS, Google Cloud, or Vercel. Deploy your application to production environments with just a single click.

item5.title: Multi-Language & Frameworks
item5.desc: Supports exporting source code in a wide variety of the most popular languages and frameworks to fit all your project needs.

item6.title: Performance Optimization
item6.desc: AI doesn't just write code — it optimizes system resources, enabling your Backend to handle millions of requests daily.

step1.title: Spark the Idea
step1.desc: Enter your request in natural language (Vietnamese/English). AI will parse the requirements and design a draft system workflow.

step2.title: AI Creation & Code Gen
step2.desc: The system automatically designs database schemas, API Endpoints, and writes logic code precisely based on your requests.

step3.title: Ready to Take Off
step3.desc: Test endpoints directly on your browser, then download the source code or deploy directly to the cloud with just a 1-click.

company.desc: DMP Artificial Intelligence Technology Joint Stock Company

personal_data.title: Personal Data Policy
personal_data.b1: We collect your personal information (email, name, profile picture) when you register an account on the AI Backend Builder platform. The collected data is used for authentication and personalizing your experience.
personal_data.b2: Your data is only used to operate the service, send account-related notifications, and improve platform quality. We do not sell or share your data with third parties for commercial purposes.
personal_data.b3: All data is encrypted using AES-256 at rest and TLS 1.3 in transit. We apply strict access controls; only authorized personnel can access user data.
personal_data.b4: You have the right to view, edit, or delete all personal data at any time by contacting DMPVipProMax@gmail.com. Requests will be processed within 7 working days.

account_security.title: User Account Security
account_security.b1: We recommend users enable two-factor authentication via email OTP to protect their accounts. This prevents unauthorized access even if the password is leaked.
account_security.b2: Passwords must be at least 8 characters long, including uppercase letters, lowercase letters, numbers, and special characters. Passwords are hashed using bcrypt before storage — we never store passwords in plaintext.
account_security.b3: The system automatically detects unusual logins (strange locations, new devices) and sends alerts to your email immediately. Accounts will be temporarily locked after 5 consecutive failed login attempts.
account_security.b4: Each session lasts for 7 days. You can view and revoke all active login sessions in the Account Settings section.

cookie_policy.title: Cookie Policy
cookie_policy.b1: Cookies are small text files saved on your device when you access the platform. They help us remember your preferences and improve website performance.
cookie_policy.b2: Required cookies: maintain login sessions. Analytical cookies: collect anonymous data on how users use the platform (Google Analytics). Optional cookies: save preferred language and appearance settings.
cookie_policy.b3: You can disable non-essential cookies in the Platform Settings or through your browser. Note: disabling required cookies may affect login functionality.

api_access.title: API Data Access Rights
api_access.b1: Each account is issued a unique API key with access limited by subscription plan. API keys must be kept secure and not shared publicly.
api_access.b2_3: ⭐⭐⭐ Ultra Promax Plus Unlimited Plan: unlimited daily requests — going beyond your imagination of life.
api_access.b3: APIs only return data owned by the authenticated account. No endpoints allow access to other users' data. All requests are logged for security audits.

terms_of_use.title: Platform Terms of Use
terms_of_use.b1: By registering and using AI Backend Builder, you agree to comply with all these terms. If you do not agree, please stop using the service.
terms_of_use.b2: You are responsible for securing your credentials and all activities occurring under your account. Sharing accounts or using accounts for unauthorized commercial purposes is strictly prohibited.
terms_of_use.b3: The platform may only be used for lawful software development purposes. Using it to generate malware, attack systems, spam, or infringe intellectual property is strictly prohibited.
terms_of_use.b4: We reserve the right to suspend or delete accounts violating terms without prior notice. Users can request account deletion at any time.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.b1: AI Backend Builder provides services on an "AS IS" basis. We do not guarantee that AI-generated source code is completely bug-free or suitable for all production environments.
liability.b2: In all cases, DMP Company's liability shall not exceed the amount you paid for the service in the last 3 months. We are not liable for indirect damages.
liability.b3: We commit to a 99.5% uptime SLA monthly. Scheduled maintenance windows will be announced at least 24 hours in advance via email.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.b1: You can request a 100% refund within 7 days of payment if you have not used more than 20% of your service limit. After 7 days, no refunds apply.
refund.b2: Send an email to DMPVipProMax@gmail.com with the subject "Refund Request - [Order Code]". We will process it within 3-5 working days. Funds will be returned to the original payment method.
refund.b3: No refunds if the account violates usage terms, is past the 7-day window, or has requested a refund more than twice in 12 months.

ai_rules.title: AI Usage Guidelines
ai_rules.b1: The source code generated by AI belongs to you. You have full rights to use, edit, and distribute that code under the license you choose for your project.
ai_rules.b2: AI will refuse to generate code for illegal purposes, including: malware, phishing, security bypasses, or unlawful content. Violation prompts will be logged and may lead to account lock.
ai_rules.b3: AI can generate buggy code. We recommend always reviewing and thoroughly testing code before deploying to production. DMP is not responsible for the consequences of direct usage of untested AI code.

tech_support.title: Technical Support
tech_support.b1: DMPVipProMax@gmail.com — Response time: within 24 working hours (Monday – Friday, 8:00 – 17:30).
tech_support.b2: TEL: 1900-1chiecdeptong — Live support from 8:00 – 17:30 on working days. Out of hours, please leave a message, we will call back as soon as possible.
tech_support.b3_1: Red-tailed Green Pit Viper: Nguyen Tuan Dat - nguyentuandat4@dtu.edu.vn
tech_support.b3_2: Beer master: Bui Van Minh - buivanminh1@dtu.edu.vn
tech_support.b3_3: Clumsy hand: Tran Hoang Phu - tranhoangphu3@dtu.edu.vn

business.title: Business Partnership
business.b1: We welcome partnership proposals from technology companies, programming training centers, and investors. Please send proposals to DMPVipProMax@gmail.com.
business.b2: Become a reseller partner of DMP to earn 20-30% commission on each plan sold. Partners receive marketing support and exclusive training materials.
business.b3: Office 211, 2nd Floor, 15 LEHIENMAI Building. Schedule face-to-face meetings via email or hotline.

bug_report.title: Bug Report & Feedback
bug_report.b1: If you detect a bug, please email DMPVipProMax@gmail.com with the subject "[BUG] Brief bug description", including screenshot and reproduction steps. Critical bugs will be resolved in 24 hours.
bug_report.b2: We are always listening! Send new feature ideas via email or vote directly on the Feature Request board (coming soon). Features with the most votes will be prioritized.
bug_report.b3: Found a security vulnerability? We have a Bug Bounty program with rewards from 1,000 VND to 10,000 VND as a symbolic gesture of appreciation. Contact us for details.

careers.title: Careers at DMP
careers.b1: Senior Full-stack Developer (React + Node.js), AI/ML Engineer (Python, LLM), Product Designer (UI/UX), DevOps Engineer (AWS, Docker, K8s). See JD details on our site (coming soon).
careers.b2: DMP is a young tech startup with a flat hierarchy, promoting creativity and autonomy. Remote-friendly, flexible hours, stock options for early hires.
careers.b3: Send CV to DMPVipProMax@gmail.com with subject "[APPLY] Position Name – Full Name". Process: CV Review → Technical Test → Interview → Offer. Feedback within 5 working days.
